task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace GUI is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: A stadium shape (slot profile) is drawn
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D shape consisting of two parallel horizontal lines connected by two semicircles at the ends is visible in the sketch area.

task_completion.description: The shape is centered at the origin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The origin point (intersection of the red and green axes) is located at the exact center of the stadium shape.

task_completion.description: The dimensions are constrained to 40.00 mm length and 12.00 mm width
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dimension constraints are visible on the sketch showing '40.00' for the total horizontal length and '12.00' for the vertical width (or '6.00' for the radius of the semicircles).
The property browser or status area indicates the sketch has 0 degrees of freedom (e.g., '0 DOF' or 'ok' status).

task_completion.description: The design is saved to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The window title bar or a save dialog shows the filename 'slot_profile.slvs' and the path '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the design
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SolveSpace graphical interface, tools, and canvas.
Screenshots show the step-by-step process of drawing lines, arcs, and applying constraints, rather than just opening a completed file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) are seen editing the .slvs file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/slot_profile.slvs. The expected geometry dimensions are a length of 40.0mm (tolerance 2.0mm) and a width of 12.0mm (or radius of 6.0mm).
